announcement.goal.sparkwitch.grand_witch: Coordinate the witches and survive with your cohort.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.accomplice: Support the Grand Witch and survive with your cohort.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.apprentice_: Help the passengers while carrying a witch skill.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.murderous_w: Pursue your own agenda with a witch skill.
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.name: Ceremonial Sword
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.descri: Spend 100 mana to turn one knife into a Ceremonial Sword for 10 seconds.
replay.death.sparkwitch.ceremonial_blade: %s had their throat sealed by %s's §5Ceremonial Sword§r
%s had their throat sealed by a §5Ceremonial Sword§r
message.sparkwitch.skill.no_skill: You do not have a witch skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.not_witch: Only witch roles can use witch skills.
message.sparkwitch.skill.dead: You must be alive to use a witch skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.cooldown: Your witch skill is cooling down for %s seconds.
message.sparkwitch.skill.unavailable: That witch skill cannot be used now.
message.sparkwitch.skill.ceremonial_swor: The Ceremonial Sword is already active.
You need a knife to use this skill.
